description: After processing the Specialty Capital Plaud transcript this morning, Jarvis did not tag the three attendees (Jerry Pender, Evan, Filipe) in the Plaud platform. Speaker rename was run via --rename flag to register voice embeddings, but the session closed without confirming Plaud-side contact tagging was complete.
correction: After processing any Plaud transcript with named speakers, confirm attendee tagging is complete in the Plaud platform before marking the recording as processed. Do not close out the Plaud workflow without this step.
systemic_fix: Add explicit Plaud contact tagging verification as a required step in the plaud-transcripts SKILL.md processing checklist. The step must confirm speaker names are tagged in the Plaud UI, not just registered via API rename.
